a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Based on the expert estimates and index by V-Dem, weighted by countries' populations. It captures the extent to which
people are free from government torture, political killings, and forced labor, they have property rights, and enjoy the
freedoms of movement, religion, expression, and association. The variables ranges from 0 to 1 (most rights).
